meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Engaine was born in 1385, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Margaret Skipwith. He died in 1430, in his hometown, at the age of 45.
